meaning: 曼尼普尔区[印度一中央直辖区](在印度东北部,原为邦)
examples: But it is the Indian state of Manipur.
In Manipur, holi is a six-day festival.
Hidden from public view, Manipur has become a virtual police-state.
Ms Chanu's years of fasting have made her into an iconic figure in Manipur.
This time, there were riots in Mumbai and attacks in nearby Pune on people from Manipur.
